text: I feel the curious anticipation of a thinker surrounded by glass, lights, and order. The meeting room before me is empty—an architectural promise of conversations yet to happen, knowledge yet to be exchanged. Moving toward the vibrant R+D wall, I’m caught in a contemplation of progress and possibility. Here, technological ambition and human aspiration intermingle, and I find myself marveling at how ideas evolve, connect, and shape the world. In this space, I oscillate between a sense of belonging and the thrill of the unknown—wondering what discoveries and dialogues await.
